meta.footEn: Data snapshot: 2026-07-05 · Garmin fenix 8 via Freddy

en.c5d: computed from sleep, HRV, RHR, stress & recent load
en.today: Today: rest / easy — hike or bike
en.rec: Good reset: 6h48 at score 84 with lights-out around 23:23 — a full hour longer than Friday's short night and far better balanced. Deep landed at 1h51 (27% of the night) and REM at a strong 2h16, with just 6 minutes awake. The autonomic picture is calm and steady: HRV 41 (right on the 7-day baseline of 42), RHR 53 (−1 vs yesterday and near the week's low), and morning stress is a very relaxed 14 after yesterday's 31. Nights are logged by the evening they start, so this one sits under Sat 4 (Saturday–Sunday); the chart shows the seven most recent recorded nights, with Thursday's night still the untracked slot. Yesterday was trap-bar deadlift, so today is a planned easy/rest day — a hike or bike keeps things loose. Good window to bank another solid night and roll into Monday's swim intervals fresh.

hr.c5d: izračunato iz sna, HRV-a, RHR-a, stresa i opterećenja
hr.today: Danas: odmor / lagano — planina ili bicikl
hr.rec: Dobar reset: 6h48 uz ocjenu 84 i gašenje svjetla oko 23:23 — puni sat duže od petkove kratke noći i puno uravnoteženije. Duboki san dosegao je 1h51 (27% noći), a REM snažnih 2h16, uz samo 6 minuta budnosti. Autonomna slika je mirna i stabilna: HRV 41 (točno na 7-dnevnoj osnovici 42), RHR 53 (−1 vs jučer, blizu tjednog minimuma), a jutarnji stres vrlo opušten 14 nakon jučerašnjih 31. Noći se bilježe prema večeri kojom počinju, pa ova stoji pod Sub 4 (subota–nedjelja); graf prikazuje sedam najnovijih zabilježenih noći, a četvrtkova noć ostaje nezabilježena. Jučer je bilo trap-bar mrtvo dizanje, pa je danas planirani lagani/odmorni dan — planina ili bicikl drži tijelo labavim. Dobra prilika da se ubere još jedna solidna noć i uđe u ponedjeljkove plivačke intervale svjež.
